verdict.summary: Round 3 resolves both prior major findings. The launcher polling budget is now derived from WATCHDOG_SECS plus validated startup grace, and the hermetic self-test checks that relationship at the default and maximum watchdog values. Launcher completion now succeeds only when DONE is observed and the archive is transferred and extracted; all missing-sentinel, remote-failure, and transfer-failure paths reach a nonzero exit. The self-test passes and includes the corresponding outcome truth table. No new correctness, soundness, test-validity, or security defect was found in the diff.
